codeReview.summary: Implementation adds FailureClass enum with 12 distinct categories and failure_class field to DaemonEvent TaskFailed/Error variants. Correlation ID was already present. All consumers updated. Tests pass. Clippy clean.

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. FailureClass enum has exactly 12 categories as specified. DaemonEvent variants updated with failure_class: Option<FailureClass>. All test coverage is comprehensive. API design is clean with proper serde support. No issues found.
